overall.description: A spaceship flies over an ocean and coastal mountains in a sci-fi game environment, transitioning from high altitude cloud cover to low altitude terrain flight, ending with a hard cut to a character standing on a desert surface. The footage features cinematic game engine rendering with warm sunset lighting.

events.description: distant coastal landmass becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic spaceship with glowing blue thrusters over a vast ocean

entered.detail: futuristic spacecraft with twin hulls and blue ion thrusters
calm reflective water stretching to the horizon
scattered fluffy clouds below the flight path
bright sun high in the sky creating lens flare
small crescent celestial body visible in the teal sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a spaceship flying high above a calm ocean. Scattered clouds drift below while the sun shines brightly overhead and a crescent moon hangs in the teal sky. Around the 15-second mark, a distant landmass appears on the horizon, signaling the approach to the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: low altitude flight over coastal mountains and desert canyons

events.description: spaceship crosses from ocean to land, flying over coastal cliffs and entering mountainous terrain
spaceship banks slightly while navigating over rugged desert canyon terrain

agents.ego_description: flying the spaceship at low altitude over arid mountain ranges and desert canyons

entered.detail: steep rocky cliffs marking the boundary between ocean and land
large mountain peaks with reddish-brown desert coloring
rugged arid terrain with erosion patterns and dry riverbeds

segments.scene_description: The spaceship transitions from ocean to land, flying over coastal cliffs and descending into a vast desert mountain range. The terrain below features reddish arid canyons and sparse vegetation. The camera follows the ship as it banks gently while navigating the rugged landscape, with the ocean gradually disappearing behind as mountains fill the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert surface with rocky outcrops under overcast sky

events.description: hard cut from aerial spaceship view to ground level third-person perspective of a character

agents.ego_description: character in armored spacesuit standing on desert ground looking toward the horizon

notable_agents.action: standing still in a spacesuit with helmet and backpack on rocky desert terrain

entered.detail: character wearing detailed spacesuit with reflective helmet and utility backpack
uneven desert ground with scattered rocks and pebbles
large boulder outcropping against the sky

segments.scene_description: The video cuts abruptly to a ground-level third-person view of an astronaut standing on rocky desert terrain. The sky appears more overcast with darker clouds compared to the previous aerial shots. The character stands still facing away from the camera, surrounded by large rock formations in an arid, desolate environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey from a high-altitude ocean crossing to a desolate ground-level desert landscape. It begins with a spaceship gliding above a calm sea under a bright teal sky where a crescent moon is visible, moving steadily toward a distant landmass on the horizon. As the ship reaches the coastline, the camera descends from the clouds to navigate over rugged coastal cliffs and into a vast range of reddish arid canyons. The scene then shifts from the sweeping flight over sparse vegetation and rocky peaks to an abrupt ground-level perspective of an astronaut standing still on the desert surface. Finally, the environment transforms into a desolate expanse of large rock formations under a darker, more overcast sky.
